ads.author: Greg Gelber
ads.title: 1950s J.F. Frantz U.S. Marshal Vintage Shooting Gallery Arcade Game – Silver Dollar Saloon!
ads.description: Fully working 1950s J.F. Frantz "U.S. Marshal" Mechanical Shooting Gallery – Vintage Coin-Op Western Arcade Game Authentic 1950s U.S. Marshal (Silver Dollar Saloon) shooting gallery by J.F. Frantz Mfg. Co. Chicago. This fully mechanical, no-electricity-needed 10¢ coin-op game is a fun piece of arcade and Western history. Classic blue cabinet with "U.S. Marshal" star, cowboy-on-horse silhouette, and silver stars. Mounted spring-loaded pistol that shoots steel balls. Colorful Western town backdrop with pop-up targets (Silver Dollar Saloon, Pedro's Sheriff's Office, Post Office, etc.) Score ranks you from "Tenderfoot" to "U.S. Marshal" Complete with original graphics, pistol, metal legs, and glass. Shows honest vintage wear, scuffs, chips, and patina from age/use (see all photos + extra close-ups of marks/damage in Google Drive link below). The two locks (coin door and cash box) do not have keys. Perfect for a man cave, game room, or Western/arcade collection. Local pickup only. It's heavy! Approx. dimensions: 53–65" tall on legs × ~34" deep × 15–20" wide. Asking $1,150 OBO Serious local buyers only. Cash only at pickup. Message with questions. Google Drive link for additional close-up photos of all marks, scuffs, and damage: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1Dly0ZuKovNSmas8aq_EoCK61z6GPzq3A?usp=sharing

ads.author: Sean Lannoo
ads.title: Williams Spacelab Pinball Machine – Fully Serviced & Ready to Play
ads.description: Up for sale is a Williams Spacelab pinball machine (1974). This is the Add-a-Ball version of Skylab. Machine has been completely gone through and is playing great. A true vintage piece that looks fantastic and would make an awesome addition to any game room, collection, or man cave. Playfield fully cleaned and waxed. All light bulbs upgraded to LEDs. Machine has been serviced and is ready to enjoy. Backglass has some paint flaking but has been coated to prevent further damage. Playfield shows minor signs of age with some paint pealing but no major ball wear. Overall very good condition for a 50+ year-old machine. Message for more details, or to come see it in person.

ads.description: Mark your calenders for Saturday April 25th at 10AM. I will be joining forces with Name Brand Liquidation to do an EPIC Live auction! We have multible tractor trailer loads and over 100K worth of name brand merchandise that will be auctioned at incredible prices. These are NOT pallet return items. This is all brand new guaranteed merchandise. Posting pics and will post more and a video as it gets closer. Some of the great items available will be Air conditioners (all sizes), sporting goods, bicycles, electric bikes, Lawn and garden, power tools, appliances big and small, Large video arcade games, money safes, furniture (Indoor/Outdoor), elctronics, toys and so much more! Great deals to be had and food and drinks served will help make this an EPIC event. 3245 Pottery Circle MB 29579 Saturday April 25th starting at 10am

ads.author: David Bolton
ads.title: Pinball machine Hokus Pokus 1975 owned since 1979
ads.description: Edit March 20 We moved into new place and something happened along the way where it is no longer resetting. When you hit the reset button it makes a noise like it's going from one to two player but nothing resets. I know it's something minor. I have lowered the price considerably. Had every switch , blade and contact filed and cleaned and machine shopped out in 2021 by Terri Irwin , a long time respected pinball mechanic in Ocala. Has a few lights out. Only issue is sometimes the score reel does not completely set over and you have to hit the button again to restart it. One of those Ghost in the machine kind of things that she just couldn't figure out . I have owned this game since 1979 when I received it as a kid. You might have seen this up for sale in the past and then the listing disappeared. This was a period of time when I needed money for something so I put it up for sale but then something else came through and I took it down because I didn't really want to sell it. At this point in life it is mostly just nostalgia. I just don't play it anymore. It is very fun game I am just bored with it after 45 years and want something different. Very open to trades for a newer pinball machine plus cash on my end. Thanks for looking! Nine zero four four four four one four three nine.. Dave

ads.author: Allen Robinson
ads.title: Capcom Bowling, Upright Arcade, Capcom 1988 (Project Cab)
ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – Capcom Bowling (Capcom, 1988) Price: $200 (or best offer) This is a Capcom Bowling upright arcade cabinet in a Centipede Cabinet. Condition: - Cabinet is very old and needs a lot of love. - Monitor does not currently power on — likely needs new caps. - Nothing comes on at the moment; best to start troubleshooting with the power supply and work your way from there. - Sold as-is. Highlights: - Classic Capcom sports arcade with bowling gameplay. - Upright cabinet design from the golden age of arcades. - Great candidate for restoration or display in a retro collection. Important: - Price is $200, or best offer - Serious buyers only. Price Breakdown: Capcom Bowling PCS ($40) Control Panel and Trackball ($60) Cabinet ($100) CRT (dunno if its dead so $0?) Wiring, coin door, misc ($40)

ads.title: Off Road Challenge
ads.description: Off Road Challenge is a 1997 arcade and 1998 Nintendo 64 racing game by Midway, known for its arcade-style, multi-terrain off-road racing with customizable trucks, power-ups like nitro, and hidden vehicles. It's considered a spiritual successor to Ivan "Ironman" Stewart's Super Off Road, featuring modes like circuit racing where players earn cash to upgrade performance parts like suspension and tires, and multiplayer split-screen action. The game includes various obstacles like trains and UFOs, and tracks set in locations like the Mojave Desert and Las Vegas Dm me for more details

ads.author: Michael Sedovic
ads.title: Silent Scope 2 Arcade Machine – Fully Working, FRAM Upgrade (No Suicide Chip)
ads.description: Silent Scope 2: Dark Silhouette arcade cabinet in excellent working condition. Everything works exactly as it should. The screen is bright, the scope is accurate, and controls are responsive. Major upgrade, no more failure risk. This machine has been upgraded with FRAM (FM18W08-PG), eliminating the original Timekeeper RAM / “suicide chip” issue that causes many of these to fail over time. This means no battery dependency, no data loss, and long-term reliability. Features: Fully tested and 100% working Original dedicated cabinet (not a conversion) Scope tracks accurately Strong picture and sound Clean and well-maintained This is a plug-and-play arcade classic, ideal for a home game room or collector. Asking $1,400 OBO Located in Buford Pickup only – I can help load These are getting harder to find in fully working condition with this upgrade. Serious inquiries only

ads.author: Russel Benthal
ads.title: Classic 1981 Nintendo Donkey Kong Original Arcade Machine in Dedicated Cabinet TKG4-UP-US Blue
ads.description: Up for sale is an authentic piece of gaming history: an all original 1981 Nintendo Donkey Kong upright arcade machine. This is a dedicated cabinet featuring the iconic "Nintendo Blue" finish and original artwork. The machine has been recently brought back to life after years of storage. It is currently in fully playable condition and only needs a final dial-in of the H-hold coil on the monitor in order to be perfect, which I do not know how to do. All original parts with zero modifications or customizations other than bypassing the coin mechanism to allow free play (this can be reversed easily). Pickup in Concord, NC or I can arrange delivery for an extra fee after payment has been made. Cash, Cashapp, Paypal, Money Order or Cashier Check. I will also take trades on gold and silver.

ads.description: I have an original 1990's Lethal Enforcers Arcade cabinet in great working and cosmetic condition that I am looking to sell or possibly trade. Everything works as it should. This game is very fun to play but its time to find it a new home. I am asking $1750 or possibly will trade. I look for vintage watches, gold/silver coins and jewelry, retro video games and more. Send me a message with what you have and maybe we can work out a deal. Pickup in Hammond.

ads.description: Vindicators Dedicated Arcade machine. Everything has Been tested & 100% working, Set to Take Quarters, With new locks and keys, monitor is bright and crisp. Cab little Rough not to bad, Open to trades on pinball or Arcade machines working or not. Pickup in Clarkson Ky.

ads.author: Mike Sullivan
ads.title: 1976 Gottlieb Target Alpha EM Pinball Machine
ads.description: I have just completed bringing this machine back to life and everthing works and plays properly. All rubber bands are new. Schematics, manual, instructions, spare score cards are included. Machine is in great shape for being 50 years old. Backglass is near perfect and playfield and plastic shields are all in great shape. For local pickup and can ship if you make all arrangements for crating, packing, and shipping. Will consider trade for other EM or Electronic machine/s. I have more pictures available and can take others upon request.

ads.title: Bally Attack from Mars Digital Pinball Machine
ads.description: Awesome Bally Attack from Mars pinball machine. Super fun game with cool alien artwork and shiny chrome details. All buttons and plunger there. Great for game room. Excellent condition. Can deliver for small fee if needed.

ads.title: Adams family arcade machine missing parts
ads.description: This came in a bundle deal looking to recover cost only missing 2 boards and play field spinner by the looks of it but may be missing more . Never seen one of these before so just going by what I see Pick up Thomas cove Dr groveland FL. We will assist in shipping. You can send your own shipping company in or we work with Woody's haul and ace in shipping machines. Cabinet is in great shape just missing parts sold as is. If post is up it's available

ads.author: Shane Starr
ads.title: Daytona USA - Working Twincab
ads.description: Fully working Daytona Twin Cab; played great. Player 2 CRT tinted slightly green and could use adjustment/repairs but head to head racing works great. Played great in our arcade, but ready to retire to someone else's arcade or for home usage. Card readers will be removed at purchase. Can be set to free play or set up with new readers / coin system.

ads.title: Hang On Project Cab
ads.description: Non working project cab. Cabinet is in great shape but someone stuck an LCD inside with a VGA connection. Includes the board but gets artifacting on power up / display. Board could be repaired.

ads.author: Shane Starr
ads.title: Neo Geo in Dynamo Cab
ads.description: Working Neo Geo cab with multi cart. Works great! Used to have a card reader; can be set to free play for home use.

ads.author: Cory Anderson
ads.title: Carnival Arcade Game
ads.description: I have Carnival arcade game made by Gremlin/Sega in 1980 . Game plays great. I will not answer questions in the comments section. PM me if you interested. Asking $900.00 Firm. Located in Jacksonville, Florida. Shipping anywhere in the country will cost between $500.00-$750.00 through Beltman Logistics / STI.

ads.author: Keith Swanson
ads.title: Blitz 99 original commercial Arcade Machine
ads.description: I am selling my Original Blitz 99 arcade. New NOS crt monitor installed. Perfect picture. Cabinet in good shape ( some dings on it nothing major ) plays perfect. Offered by Arcade Doctor of Orlando.

ads.author: Mario Bucheli
ads.title: Area 51 Site 4 Full-Size Arcade Cabinet – Dynamo Z Back - Good Condition
ads.description: Selling my Area 51: Site 4 full-size arcade cabinet in nice condition. Original game running on board/PCB inside a Dynamo Z Back cabinet. Usual wear and tear from normal use, but overall clean and presents well. Monitor is pristine and the marquee lights up. Includes/Features: -Area 51: Site 4 full-size arcade cabinet -Game board/PCB (not an emulation build) -Dynamo cabinet -Brand new guns installed (working) -Pristine monitor -Light-up marquee -Sound and gameplay fully functional Fully assembled and ready to play. Downsizing my game room. All cabinets are from a private collection. Check my profile for other machines. Will consider bundle pricing for serious buyers.

ads.author: Dirk Smith Johnson
ads.title: Rare Williams OXO Pinball Machine
ads.description: Very rare Williams OXO pinball machine. Previously featured at the Roanoke Pinball Museum in Virginia. This is a unique electro-mechanical game that plays tic-tac-toe! This game has been in fully working condition until recently when it started blowing a fuse during game restart. It's most likely a switch contact somewhere that's broken, but I've been too busy to diagnose it, and I need the room, so I'm willing to sell it for less than I paid to someone who wants a unique game, and is willing to tinker with it. This game is basically in original condition except for being upgraded with $200+ worth of LEDs to make it brighter and more reliable.

ads.title: Williams MISS-O Pinball Machine
ads.description: Vintage Williams MISS-O pinball machine. Super cool retro pool-themed artwork on the backglass and playfield. Lights are on, ready to play! Has coin slots for nickels and dimes, plus flipper buttons on both sides. Great piece for a game room.

ads.author: Darcy Ferrigno
ads.title: Galaga arcade game by Midway
ads.description: For sale is this original 1981 Galaga Arcade game. I have personally owed this machine for over 30 years. It has been in my personal collection for this time (not Arcade Used). This machine is fully functional and has new locks and keys on coin box and back access panel. Please note this is an original Galaga Arcade Game from 1981. It may have some cabinet scratches and scuff marks etc. (Please see pictures). Game Dimensions: H: 68′′, W: 25′′, D: 27′′ Weight approx. 190 lbs Local pickup or seller will assist if buyer provides, arranges, and pays for shipping company. Price : $1500 OBO
